summary: DHH shares a video recording of his 'Ruby on Rails, Take II' presentation from Roskilde University. The two-hour session is split into a one-hour presentation followed by a one-hour tutorial. He provides streaming and download links for viewers to watch the footage.
key_points: Early Rails evangelism through university presentations in Denmark
The presentation format combined a conceptual talk with a hands-on tutorial
Distribution challenges of 2004: streaming via RTSP protocol and a 160MB QuickTime download
money_quotes: It's a two-hour show split into a 1-hour presentation followed by a 1-hour tutorial.
key_insight: This brief post documents an early moment in Rails history, when DHH was personally evangelizing the framework through university presentations before its widespread adoption.
